repos.name: Lecture_Transcript_Summarizer
repos.description: Generative Transcript Transformation is an AI-powered tool designed to convert unstructured conversational transcripts into well-structured, educational teaching transcripts. This project utilizes OpenAI's API to process text inputs and generate comprehensive, logically organized course materials for instructors.

linkedinPosts.text: 🎓 Capstone Project – Smart Growbox: AI-Powered Autonomous Plant Monitoring & Cultivation System. An AI-enhanced cultivation platform designed for indoor and small-scale farming — integrating IoT sensing, edge AI, computer vision and GPT-driven decision intelligence.
linkedinPosts.author: Baha Kızıl

linkedinPosts.text: I'm happy to share that I've been accepted into the AI Bootcamp organized by Kairu. It's a great opportunity to improve my skills in AI engineering. Thanks to the Kairu team!
linkedinPosts.author: Baha Kızıl

linkedinPosts.text: AI-Powered Security System Project. I developed an AI-powered human detection system using YOLOv11 that analyzes security camera footage, detects humans in real time, and sends instant email notifications with captured frames. Trained on a Roboflow dataset and wrapped in a friendly web UI.
linkedinPosts.author: Baha Kızıl

linkedinPosts.text: 🚦 Real-Time Traffic Management with Computer Vision — turning ordinary CCTV cameras into powerful traffic analysis tools. Lane-level flow, classification, and violations in real time.
linkedinPosts.author: Baha Kızıl

linkedinPosts.text: Smart Traffic Monitoring: Real-Time CCTV Analysis. Integrating Roboflow's polygon tool with CCTV footage, YOLOv12N trained for 250 epochs for real-time traffic violation detection.
linkedinPosts.author: Baha Kızıl

linkedinPosts.text: 🚀 Fine-Tuning YOLOv12n for Fire & Smoke Detection. 250 epochs on Google Colab A100. Enhanced detection accuracy with high-performance real-time analysis.
